title: The pandemic is still here and we are all out of patience and money
section_path: The pandemic is still here and we are all out of patience and money
section_path_text: The pandemic is still here and we are all out of patience and money
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias, Chief Economist
Last week saw stronger aggregate demand and, expectedly, more inflation across the board. It also featured a soothing speech by Jay Powell that inflation is temporary, although a growing number of investors harbour doubts as to whether this reflects an independent estimate or the preference of a central bank with no exit strategy from financial repression. However, the important news of the week is reflected in the dichotomy between the growing number of Covid-19 cases worldwide and further easing of restrictions.
